index.title: Kaiwhakamāori Rauemi
index.description: Ka whakatuwheratia e te Kaiwhakamāori Rauemi ngā tono kume whakamāori-mīhini mō ō kōnae rauemi ahakoa te repo, ahakoa te hōputu — he mea whakahikotia e Azure AI Translator, AWS Translate, Google Cloud Translation rānei.
index.socialTitle: Kaiwhakamāori Rauemi — whakamāoritia aunoatia ngā kōnae rauemi
index.badge: v3.0 — Azure, AWS & Google providers, Node 24, repo config
index.lede: Ka whakatuwheratia e te Kaiwhakamāori Rauemi ngā tono kume kua whakamāoritia e te mīhini mō ō kōnae rauemi mā te whakamahi i Azure, AWS, Google rānei — kotahi hohenga whakakotahi, kotahi kaiwhakarato mō ia whakahaere, ngā SDK whai mana i raro i te kōhua.
index.workflowTitle: Ko te whakawhitinga hei rerengamahi, ehara i te mahi.
index.workflowBody: Whakataka te hohenga ki tō CI tīariari, tohua ki Azure, AWS, Google rānei, ka tuku i tō repo ki te kōrero i ngā reo katoa e ūnga ana koe.

formats.title: E ono ngā hōputu kōnae
formats.body: Ngā {resx} haere, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, me ngā {restext} me te hōputu pūmau-paita.

config.title: Whirihoranga taumata-repo
config.body: Whakataka i tētahi kōnae {configPath} mō ngā kāwai whakauru, ngā kupukupu, me ngā kāwai Kaiwhakamāori Ritenga.

glossary.title: Kupukupu-mōhio
glossary.body: Maukatia ngā ingoa parani me ngā whakaritenga hua ki te regex rohe-kupu atamai e whakahaere ana i ngā {cpp}, {dotnet}, me ngā hoa.

dryRun.title: Whakahaere-maroke + hinganga ngohengohe
dryRun.body: Arokitea ngā whakawhitinga me te kore tuhi kōnae, whakakitea rānei ia hapa hei whakatūpato i a koe e auau ana.

outputs.title: Ngā huaputa ratarata PR
outputs.body: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, me {hasNewTranslations} kāniwha hāngai tonu ki te waihanga-kume-tono.

sdk.title: Azure, AWS & Google
sdk.body: Kōwhiria tētahi kaiwhakarato mō ia whakahaere. Ka whakahaeretia ia e tōna SDK whaimana ({azureSdk}, {awsSdk}, {googleSdk}) me ngā whakamātau aunoa i te {statusCodes} — kāore he HTTP ā-ringa. {esbuild}-paihere, arotaupū-mā.

workflowPreview.body: E toru ngā muna, e whā ngā raina, ā, he reo maha tō repo i te pana panuku.

cta.title: Kua rite koe ki te whakawāhi i runga i te autopilot?
cta.body: Kotahi te kī kaiwhakarato — Azure, AWS, Google rānei — me tētahi kōnae rerengamahi. Mā te Kaiwhakamāori Rauemi e whakahaere te toenga.

getting-started.title: Kei te tīmata
getting-started.lede: Tāpirihia he kōnae rerengamahi, tohua ki ō taipitopito tuakiri Azure AI Translator, ā, mā te hohenga e karapa te repo mō ngā kōnae rauemi reo-pūtake, ā, ka whakaputa i ngā teina kua whakamāoritia.

provision.title: Whakarato rauemi Azure AI Translator
provision.body: Waihangatia tētahi rauemi Azure AI Translator ki te tomokanga Azure, kātahi ka penapena i ēnei e whai ake nei hei muna putunga GitHub kia taea ai e te rerengamahi te pānui:
provision.key: te kī ohaurunga mō te rauemi.
provision.region: te rohe Azure o te rauemi.

resource.title: Tukua he kōnae rauemi pūtake
resource.body: Ka whakamahia e ngā kōnae rauemi te {namingConvention} convention. Hei tauira, ka noho {sourceFile} {frFile}, {deFile}, me ērā atu mea i muri i te oma.

output.title: Tirohia te huaputa
output.body: Ka mutu te rerengamahi, ka whakaaturia e te hohenga e toru ngā huaputa ka taea e koe te waea ki tētahi whakaahuatanga PR: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, me {hasNewTranslations}. Ka tuhi hoki i tētahi whakarāpopototanga Markdown ki te whārangi mahi mā te {coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Ngā tūmahi panuku
nextSteps.configuration: Whirihoratia ngā taunoa taumata-repo ki te {configPath}.
nextSteps.recipes: Tirohia ngā tohutohu mō ngā monorepos, ngā papakupu ritenga, me ngā kāwai Kaiwhakamāori Ritenga.

providers.title: Ngā kaituku takatau
providers.lede: Kōwhiria tētahi kaiwhakarato whakamāori mō ia whakahaere — Azure AI Translator, AWS Translate, Google Cloud Translation rānei — i muri i tētahi mata API kotahi, whakakotahi. He ōrite te whanonga o te kaiwhakamāori ahakoa te kaiwhakarato; ko ngā taipitopito tuakiri anake e rerekē ana.
providers.backwardCompatible: Hototahi whakamuri katoa: {provider} taunoa ki te {azure}, nā reira ka mahi tonu ngā rerengamahi Azure tīariari — kāore he whakatika e hiahiatia ana.

selecting.title: Tīpako ana i tētahi kaiwhakarato
selecting.body: Tautuhia te tāuru {provider} ki te {azure} (taunoa), {aws}, {google} rānei, kātahi ka homai i ngā pūkenga o taua kaiwhakarato. Kotahi anake te kaiwhakarato e whakamahia ana mō ia waea hohenga; ko te hohenga e tautapa ana ki te SDK ōrite i muri i tētahi wheketere.

aws.name: Whakamāori AWS
aws.credentials: OIDC / mekameka taunoa, awsAccessKeyId + awsSecretAccessKey rānei; awsRohe

azure.title: Azure AI Translator (taunoa)
azure.body: Te kaiwhakarato taunoa. Whakaratohia tētahi rauemi Azure AI Translator me te tuku {subscriptionKey}, {endpoint}, me te {region} kōwhiringa. He ōrite tēnei whirihoranga e whakamahia kētia ana e ngā rerengamahi tīariari.

aws.title: Whakamāori AWS
aws.body: Ka whakamahi i {sdk}. He pai ake ki te OIDC mā te {configureAwsCredentials} kia kore ai e penapenatia ngā muna roa - ka pānuitia e te hohenga te mekameka taipitopito tuakiri taunoa AWS SDK. Otiia, me {awsAccessKeyId} me te {awsSecretAccessKey} mārama. E hiahiatia ana tētahi rohe i ngā wā katoa, mā te {awsRegion}, mā te taurangi taiao {awsRegionEnv} rānei.
aws.keysNote: Hei whakamahi i ngā kī pateko kaua ko te OIDC, whakataka te hipanga {configureAwsCredentials} ka hipa {awsAccessKeyId} / {awsSecretAccessKey} (mā te {secrets}) me te {awsRegion}.

google.title: Whakawhitinga Kapua Google
google.body: Ka whakamahi i te {sdk} (v2). Whakamotuhēhētia mā tētahi kī API ({googleApiKey}), ki tētahi taipitopito tuakiri JSON pūkete ratonga rānei ({googleCredentials}). Hoatu kia kotahi tonu; Ina aweretia tētahi {googleProjectId} kōwhiringa mai i te taipitopito tuakiri.

mapping.title: Maherenga kaitaupūtā-whāinga
mapping.body: Ka maheretia ngā pūpūtā tauwhāiti-kaiwhakarato ki te tīariari o tētahi ōrite. Ka hoki ngā mea katoa ki ngā taunoa tika kia ōrite tonu ai te whanonga.
mapping.caption: Maherenga kaitauwhāiti-whāinga puta noa i ngā kaiwhakarato

profanityAction.aws: Kua tohua / Kua mukua te hīpoki →

locales.title: He rerekē ngā waehere wāhi mō ia kaiwhakarato
locales.body: Ka whakamahi ia kaiwhakarato i ōna ake waehere paetata (hei tauira, ko te Hainamana Ngāwari e {azureCode} ana i Azure, {awsCode} i AWS, me {googleCode} i Google). Ka haere ngā waehere mā te pēnei, ā, ka whakahaere i ngā ingoa kōnae huaputa, nā reira kōwhiria {toLocales} ngā uara e tautokona ana e tō kaiwhakarato kua tīpakohia.

configuration.title: Whirihoranga
configuration.lede: Kia kotahi te whakapuaki i ngā taunoa i roto i te kōnae whirihoranga putunga, ā, ka tuku i ia rerengamahi kia riro i a rātou. Ka toa ngā tāurunga hohenga i ngā wā katoa ina tukua ngā mea e rua.
configuration.intro: Takahi i te ara ki te tāuru {configPath} mēnā e hiahia ana koe ki tētahi tauwāhi taunoa-kore.

fields.sourceLocale: Ka hoki whakamuri ki te tāuru {sourceLocale} ki te kore e tautuhia. Ka whakamua hoki ki te Kaiwhakamāori hei {fromLocale} kia kore ai ngā aho poto e kiteanoatia.
fields.toLocales: He huānga, he aho whakawehe-piko rānei.
fields.includeExclude: Ngā tauira glob i arotakea ki ngā ara pūmau me ngā ara pātahi mokowāmahi.
fields.glossary: Ngā takahitanga kupu i muri i te whakamāoritanga. E mōhio ana ki te rohenga-kupu (ka raweke i te {cpp}, {dotnet}).
fields.categoryId: Kāwai {customTranslatorLink} Azure — tō pona umanga/rohe (ā-ture, rongoā, oro mākete, aha atu). I tukua hei {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Taunoa ai ki te {plain}. Whakamahia {html} anake mēnā he kongakonga HTML tūturu kei ō uara rauemi.
fields.profanityAction: Me pēhea te whakamahi i ngā kupu whakarihariha i roto i te huaputa kua whakamāoritia.
fields.allowFallback: Tautuhia ki te {false} kia rahua te whakawhitinga ina kore tō {categoryId} e tuku mō tētahi wāhi ūnga, kaua e hoki whakamuri ki te tauira ahuwhānui.
fields.apiVersion: Putanga REST API kaiwhakamāori. Taunoa ai ki te {version}.
fields.maxRetries: Ko te mōrahi o ngā nganatanga ngana anō i runga i ngā urupare HTTP rangitahi ({statusCodes}). Taunoa ai ki te {defaultRetries}. He {totalCalls} te tapeke o ngā waea HTTP mō ia tono.
fields.retryBackoffMs: Pū (ms) i runga i tētahi moe whakamuri kotahi. Taunoa ai ki te {defaultBackoff}. Ka whakahonoretia te pane {retryAfter} o Azure i te wā i konei; ki te kore ka whakamahia te whakahoki taupua āmaimai, ka whakawhāititia ki tēnei uara.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Taunoa ai ki te {true}. Ina kā ana, ka whakakapia ngā maimai pēnei i te {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} me ngā mea HTML ki ngā maimai sentinel i mua i te whakamāoritanga, ā, ka whakaoratia i muri iho. Monokia anake mēnā kei roto i te pūtake ngā āhuatanga puriwāhi.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Kua tāpirihia ētahi atu tauira regex (me te kore kaiwehe) ki te huinga puriwāhi taunoa, hei tauira, {angleToken} mō te wetereo maimai ritenga. Ka waihotia ngā kōrero kōrero muhu.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Ko ngā tauira glob e ōrite ana ki ngā kī taumata-parser (ara iraira JSON, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, kī INI/restext). Ka whakatakahia ngā kī ōrite mai i te tono, ā, ka puta atu me te uara pūtake e pupuritia ana.

steps.actionInputs: Ka pānui te hohenga i ngā tāurunga mārama mai i te rerengamahi.
steps.config: Ka utaina te whirihoranga YAML mai i {configPath}.
steps.precedence: Mō ia āpure tiritiri, ka toa te tāuru; ki te kore ka whakamahia te uara YAML.
steps.validation: Kua whakamanatia ngā uara hanumi. Mā ngā tau muhu (hei tauira, {invalidEnum}) ka rahua tere te hohenga me tētahi karere ūkui.

tone.heading: Oro me te mahi, i roto i ngā kupu māmā
tone.body: Kāore he pona oro kotahi o te Azure AI Translator v3 API. E rua ngā tautuhinga e paheko ana hei hoatu i te nuinga o te mana ōrite:
tone.industryBody: whakamahia {categoryId} hei tohu i tētahi kāwai Azure {customTranslatorLink} kua whakaakona ki tō ake huinga — ā-ture, hangarau, rongoā, mākete, tētahi atu mea rānei. Koinei te kōwhiti tino kaha mō te oro, te reo parani, me te kupu.
tone.surfaceBody: Whakamahia te {glossaryLink} hei maukati i ngā ingoa parani me ngā kupu hua kuputuhi, me te whakamahi i te {profanityAction} hei horoi i ngā kupu whakarihariha ina whakarite i te whakawāteatanga mō ngā kaimātakitaki tamariki.

inputs.title: Ngā tāuru me ngā tāputa
inputs.lede: Ka whakaaetia hoki ia tāurunga i roto i te kōnae whirihoranga repo kōwhiringa. Ina tautuhia ngā mea e rua, ka toa te tāuru hohenga.
inputs.configurationIntro: Tirohia {configurationLink} mō te aronuinga YAML me te raupapa utanga.

items.sourceLocale: Ko te wāhi pūtake (hei tauira, {en}) e whakamahia ana hei kimi i ngā kōnae rauemi pēnei i te {sourceGlob}. I tukuna hoki ki te kaiwhakarato hei {fromLocale}.

providerInputs.heading: Tīpakonga kaiwhakarato me ngā taipitopito tuakiri
providerInputs.caption: Tīpakonga kaiwhakarato me ngā taipitopito tuakiri mō ia kaihoko
providerInputs.intro: Kōwhiria tētahi kaiwhakarato mō ia whakahaere me {provider}. Homai anake ngā taipitopito tuakiri o te kaiwhakarato kua tīpakohia — tirohia te aratohu {providersLink} mō te tatūnga katoa.

items.provider: Kaituku whakamāori: {azure} (taunoa), {aws}, {google} rānei. Kotahi anake te kaiwhakarato e whakamahia ana mō ia waea hohenga.
items.subscriptionKey: Kī ohaurunga Azure AI Translator. E hiahiatia ana mō {azure}. Hipa mā {secrets}.
items.endpoint: Azure Translator endpoint URL, e.g. {endpointUrl}. E hiahiatia ana mō {azure}.
items.awsAccessKeyId: TT kī uru AWS. Kōwhiringa — waiho (me te {awsSecretAccessKey}) ki te whakamahi i te mekameka taipitopito tuakiri taunoa AWS / OIDC. Hipa mā {secrets}.
items.awsSecretAccessKey: Kī uru muna AWS. Me tuku tahi me te {awsAccessKeyId}. Hipa mā {secrets}.
items.awsSessionToken: He maimai wātū AWS kōwhiri mō ngā taipitopito tuakiri rangitahi. Hipa mā te {secrets}.
items.awsRegion: Rohe AWS mō te ratonga Whakamāori (hei tauira, {regionExample}). E hiahiatia ana mō te {aws} ki te kore {awsRegionEnv} e tautuhia ki te taiao.
items.googleApiKey: Kī API Kapua Google. Homai tēnei {googleCredentials} OR mō {google}. Hipa mā {secrets}.
items.googleCredentials: Kī pūkete-ratonga Google Cloud hei aho JSON. Homai tēnei {googleApiKey} OR mō {google}. Hipa mā {secrets}.
items.googleProjectId: ID kaupapa Google Cloud kōwhiringa. I te nuinga o te wā ka whakawhiwhia mai i te taipitopito tuakiri pūkete ratonga.

items.region: Rohe rauemi kaiwhakamāori (waiho mō ngā rauemi huri noa).
items.toLocales: Ngā rohe hei whakamāori. Ka whakaae ki tētahi huānga JSON ({jsonArray}), ngā uara whakawehe-piko rānei.
items.include: Ngā tauira glob wehewehe-raina-hou; Ko ngā kōnae ōrite anake ka whakamāoritia.
items.exclude: Ngā tauira glob wehewehe-raina-hou; Ka tīpoka ngā kōnae ōrite (ka hoatu ā muri i te whakauru).
items.configPath: Ara ki te kōnae whirihoranga YAML (e pātahi ana ki te iomatua mokowāmahi).
items.dryRun: Ina {true}, whakahaerehia ngā whakawhitinga me te tuku whakarāpopototanga, engari kaua e tuhi kōnae.
items.failOnError: Ina {true}, ka hinga ngā hapa ohorere i te hohenga; Ina {false}, he whakatūpato ngā hapa.

translatorInputs.heading: Ngā tāurunga tono Azure Translator
translatorInputs.intro: Ka mahere hāngai ēnei ki ngā tawhā uiui Azure AI Translator v3, ā, ka hoatu ki te kaiwhakarato Azure. ka whakamaheretia hoki te textType me te profanityAction ki AWS/Google kei reira tētahi ōrite (tirohia te aratohu kaiwhakarato); ko te toenga he Azure-anake. He kōwhiringa ia mea; ka hoatu ngā taunoa Kaiwhakamāori inā wetetautuhia.
translatorInputs.caption: Ngā tāurunga tono Azure Translator

items.categoryId: Kāwai {customTranslatorLink} Azure — te pona ahumahi/rohe/oro. I whakamua hei {categoryQuery}.
items.textType: {plain} {html} rānei. Whakamahia {html} anake ina he kongakonga HTML tūturu ō uara rauemi.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked}, {deleted} rānei. Ka whakahaere i te āhua o te whakaputa i ngā kupu whakarihariha i roto i ngā whakamāoritanga.
items.allowFallback: Ina {false}, ka whakahokia e te Kaiwhakamāori tētahi hapa, kaua e hoki whakamuri ki te pūnaha ahuwhānui mēnā kāore he tukunga o tō {categoryId} mō tētahi wāhi ūnga.

resilienceInputs.heading: Te manahau me te parenga puriwāhi
resilienceInputs.intro: Mā ēnei tāurunga e whakahaere te whanonga o te hohenga ina katia e te Kaiwhakamāori tō tono, me te whakangungu i ngā maimai puriwāhi pēnei i te {mustache}, i te {indexZero} rānei kia kore ai e pakaru i te wā o te whakamāoritanga.
resilienceInputs.caption: Ngā tāurunga manahau me te parenga puriwāhi

items.maxRetries: Ko te mōrahi o ngā nganatanga ngana anō i runga i ngā urupare HTTP rangitahi ({statusCodes}). He {totalCalls} te tapeke o ngā waea HTTP mō ia tono.
items.retryBackoffMs: Pū (i roto i ngā hēkona) i runga i tētahi moe whakamuri kotahi. Ka whakahonoretia e te hohenga te pane urupare {retryAfter} a Azure i te wā e noho ana; ki te kore ka whakamahia e ia te whakahoki taupua jittered kua whakakapia ki tēnei uara.
items.protectPlaceholders: Ina {true} (taunoa), ka whakakapia ngā puriwāhi pēnei i te {mustache}, te {jsVar}, te {indexZero}, te {numberFormat}, te {printf}, te {positionalPrintf} me ngā mea HTML ki ngā maimai sentinel i mua i te whakamāoritanga, ā, ka whakaoratia ā muri ake. Monokia anake mēnā kei roto i tō pūtake he kupu puriwāhi tūturu e tika ana kia whakamāoritia.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Kua tāpirihia ngā regex wehe-raina hōu (me te kore kaiwehe) ki te huinga puriwāhi taunoa, hei tauira, {angleToken} mō te wetereo maimai ritenga.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Ko ngā tauira glob wehe-raina hōu e ōrite ana ki ngā kī taumata-parser (ara iraira JSON, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, kī INI/restext). Ka whakatakahia ngā kī ōrite mai i te tono Kaiwhakamāori, ā, ka puta atu me te uara pūtake e pupuritia ana.

items.summaryTitle: He whakarāpopototanga taitara PR poto, hei tauira, {summaryExample}.
items.summaryDetails: Whakarāpopototanga whakahekenga e tika ana mō tētahi tinana PR, whakarāpopototanga mahi rānei.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} i te wā i hangaia ai tētahi, neke atu rānei o ngā whakamāoritanga hōu.

formats.title: Ngā hōputu kōnae
formats.heroTitle: Ngā hōputu kōnae e tautokona ana
formats.lede: E ono ngā hōputu rauemi ka taea te haere. Ka pānui te hohenga i ia kōnae pūtake-rohe, ka whakamāoritia ngā uara, ka tuhi hoki i tētahi teina mō ia wāhi ūnga.
formats.namingConvention: Ka whakamahi ngā kōnae katoa i te tikanga whakaingoa {namingConvention}.

resx.blurb: Ngā kōnae rauemi .NET ā-XML. Ka whakamāori i ngā kupu ā-roto o ia kōpuku {dataValue}, e tiaki ana i ngā tākupu me ngā raraungameta.
resx.specLabel: Microsoft Learn — Ngā Rauemi i roto i ngā kōnae .resx

xliff.blurb: Ngā tuhinga OASIS XLIFF 2.0. Ka whakamāoritia ia {source} me te tuhi i te hua ki te {target} e hāngai ana, ka tautuhi {trgLang} mō te tauwāhi.

po.blurb: Kōnae Ahanoa Kawe GNU gettext. Ka whakamāoritia ia {msgid} / {msgidPlural} ki ngā puka {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural}.

json.blurb: Ngā kōnae JSON pokanoa. Ka papatahitia ngā ahanoa kōpaetia ki te kaiwehe {delimiter} mō te whakamāoritanga, kātahi ka whakakōpaetia anōtia ki te huaputa. Ka puritia ngā kī iraira ({dottedKey}) ki te kupu.

ini.blurb: Ngā kōnae {keyValue} ngāwari (Win32-kāhua INI, tētahi whirihoranga papatahi rānei). Ka tiakina ngā pane wāhanga me ngā tākupu.

restext.blurb: Ngā rauemi kuputuhi Microsoft MUI — he takirua papatahi {keyValue} whakamahia hei hoa kuputuhi ki te {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Ngā pūmautanga haere-huri noa
roundTrip.body: Ka manatoko te huinga whakamātautau i te paita-ki-te-paita porowhita mō ngā maunga māngai o ia hōputu. Mēnā ka whati tētahi āhuatanga hōputu i tō pūtake waehere, tēnā {issueLink} ki tētahi tauira iti rawa.

recipes.title: Ngā Tohutao
recipes.lede: Ngā tauira noa mō ngā whakawhitinga tuku: monorepos, glossaries, kāwai ritenga, whakahaere maroke, me te mana oro.

pullRequest.heading: Whakatuwheratia he tono kume i muri i ia whakahaere

monorepo.heading: Monorepos: whakawhitinga whānuitanga mō ia mōkī

glossary.heading: Papakupu mō ngā ingoa parani me ngā kupu hua
glossary.intro: Whakataka {configPath} ki roto i te repo:
glossary.body: Ka hoatu ngā kupu papakupu {after} te whakamāoritanga, nā reira ka puritia e te huaputa whakamāori-mīhini tō tohu manako ahakoa i whakawhitia e te tauira mō tētahi kupu taurite.

customCategory.heading: Kāwai Kaiwhakamāori Ritenga (ahumahi/rohe)
customCategory.body: Whakaakona tētahi kāwai Azure {customTranslatorLink} ki tētahi huinga e hopu ana i ō kupu me te oro o te umanga (ā-ture, rongoā, mākete, pūkaha ā-roto, aha atu) ka tukuna tōna ID mā te {categoryId}. Koinei te kōwhiti oro tino kaha e tukuna ana e Azure.

tone.heading: Mana oro + whakahoki pākaha
tone.body: Whakakotahitia tētahi {categoryId} Kaiwhakamāori Ritenga ki te {profanityAction} me te {allowFallbackFalse} hei whakaū i tētahi reo ōrite, ā, ka rahua te rerengamahi mēnā kāore he tukunga o te kāwai i kōwhiria mō tētahi o ō rohe ūnga.

dryRun.heading: Whakahaere maroke i mua i te whakakānga o te rerengamahi
dryRun.body: Ka whakaputa tonu te hohenga i ngā huaputa whakarāpopoto me tētahi whakarāpopototanga hipanga, engari kāore he kōnae i tuhia. Whakakotahitia me {failOnErrorFalse} ki te whakaputa i ia take hei whakatūpato i a koe e auau ana.

faq.title: Nga pātai e uiuitia ai
faq.lede: Ngā whakautu tere ki ngā pātai e puta ake ana i te nuinga o te wā e whāngai ana i te mahi.

azure.heading: He pēhea te kōrero a te hohenga ki Azure?
azure.body: Mā te SDK {azureSdkLink} mana o Microsoft, i apa ki {corePipelineLink}. Mā tēnā ka ngana aunoa koe ki ngā tauira tono me te urupare {statusCodes}, me te whakahaere pane motuhēhēnga mō te koreutu — ngā mea katoa i whakamahia hei waea {axios} ā-ringa. Kāore te mata hohenga tūmatanui (ngā tāuru, ngā tāputa, ngā huaputa kōnae) i te huri.

tone.heading: He aha ngā whakamāori i ētahi wā i waho i te waitohu, i waho rānei o te oro?
tone.body: Ka taunoa te whakawhitinga mihini ki tētahi tauira take-whānui. E toru ngā pona e āwhina ana: he {glossaryLink} mō ngā takahi wā uaua, he {customTranslatorLink} mō ngā tauira kua whakaakona ki tō oro me ō kupu, me te {profanityAction} ki te horoi, ki te kara rānei i ngā kupu whakarihariha.

duplicateFiles.heading: Me pēhea taku karo i te whakamāori rua i te kōnae ōrite?
duplicateFiles.body: Whakaoho i te rerengamahi ki ngā {paths} e ōrite ana ki ō kōnae tauwāhi-pūtake anake, hei tauira, {sourceGlob}. Kei roto hoki i te hohenga tōna ake tātari kōnae ā-keu ina tautuhia {githubToken}, e whakawhāiti ana i te mahi ki ngā kōnae i roto i te tukunga hōu rawa.

offline.heading: Ka taea e au te whakahaere tuimotu i te hohenga?
offline.body: Ehara i te mea tika - ko Azure AI Translator te roro wāwhakahaere. Engari ka taea e koe te whakahaere me te {dryRunTrue} hei whakamana i te poroporo me te whirihoranga me te kore tono HTTP mō te whakamāoritanga.

node.heading: He aha te putanga Kōpuku e haere ai te hohenga?
node.body: Ka haere te v3 i runga i te wā whakahaere o GitHub Actions {nodeRuntime}. He hototahi te JavaScript paihere ki te Node 20, 22, me te 24, koia te mea e whakamātauria ana e CI.

dist.heading: No hea mai te {distDir} paihere?
dist.body: Ka tukuna e ngā hohenga GitHub JS tā rātou JS kua whakahiatohia ki te whare putunga. Ka hangaia anō e te rerengamahi {distBuild} i muri i ia hanumi ki te {mainBranch} mēnā ka mānu, ā, ka āraia e {distCheck} ngā PR ka tau i te huaputa tawhito.

formats.heading: Me pēhea ētahi atu hōputu rauemi?
formats.body: I tēnei rā: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} mēnā e hiahia ana koe ki tētahi atu — he iti te atanga parser (wetewete → mahere → hoatu whakawhitinga → hōputu) ā, ka manakohia ngā koha.

translations.title: Ngā Whakawhitinga
translations.heroTitle: Kia ora i roto i ia reo
translations.lede: Ka whakamāoritia tēnei whārangi e te Kaiwhakamāori Rauemi, i ia pana ki te matua, ki ia reo e tautokona ana e Azure AI Translator.
translations.statusComplete: {translatedCount} tāhuahua i tēnei wā — kua oti!
translations.statusPending: {translatedCount} te tāhuahua i tēnei wā — {pendingCount} tārewa ana i te {workflowName} e whai ake nei.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Rapua mā te reo, waehere, ingoa taketake rānei...
translations.translationPending: E tārewa ana te whakawhitinga — whakatuwheratia he whakahaere {workflowName}.
translations.noLocales: Kāore he rohe e ōrite ana ki taua tātari.

steps.source: Kei te {messagesPath} te kōnae pūtake Ingarihi.
steps.workflow: Ka pana i taua pā ki a ia ka whana i {workflowLink}, e rere {thisAction} ana ki a ia anō.
steps.fanOut: Ka rere atu te hohenga ki ia wāhi e tautokona ana e Azure AI Translator (kua whirihoratia ki te {configPath}) me te tuhi i tētahi {messagesLocaleJson} teina mō ia ūnga.
steps.pullRequest: Ka whakatuwheratia he tono kume me ngā whakamāoritanga hōu. Mā te hanumi ka whakaputa anō i tēnei whārangi me ngā kāri kua whakakīa.

translations.poweredBy: He mea whakahiko nā te Kaiwhakamāori Rauemi me te Kaiwhakamāori Azure AI.

contributing.title: Te Hāpai Ana
contributing.lede: E manakohia ana ngā pūrongo iro, ngā tono āhuahira, me ngā tono kume. He iti rawa te mahi kia rata ki ngā kaitāpae tuatahi.

steps.fixture: Tāpirihia he maunga ki raro i te {testDataDir}.
steps.extension: Tāpirihia te toronga kōnae ki te {translationFileSchemes} i te {finderFile}.
steps.tests: Tuhia ngā whakamātautau haere-huri noa mō te poroporo → te hōputu me te hoatu Whakamāoritanga.

coverage.heading: Ngā paepae kapinga
coverage.body: Ka whakaū te whirihoranga Jest i te kapinga mōkito. Me pupuri e te waehere hōu ngā tauākī + paepae raina ki runga ake i te 78% me ngā taumahi ki runga ake i te 90%. Tāpirihia ngā maunga me ngā whakamātautau i te taha o tō huringa.

docsSite.heading: Pae tuhinga
docsSite.body: Ko te kōpaki {docsDir} he kaupapa Astro 6 + Tailwind v4. Kia kotahi {npmInstall} whakahaerehia ki reira, kātahi ka {npmRunDev} mō te arokite paetata. Ka tukuna e te rerengamahi {pagesWorkflow} ngā tuhinga ki ngā Whārangi GitHub i ia hanumi.

changelog.title: Rangitaki Huringa
changelog.lede: Whakarāpopototanga taumata tiketike o ngā pānuitanga. E noho ana te changelog canonical, whai mana i roto i te CHANGELOG.md i roto i te whare putunga.

releases.v302: {label} Ngā tono Kaiwhakamāori ināianei kia pine {apiVersion} ki te waea mō ngā {translate} me ngā {languages}. Ka whakahonoretia anake e te Azure SDK te kōwhiringa putanga api-taumata-kiritaki ina tukuna he taipitopito tuakiri; ka whakamotuhēhētia te hohenga mō ia tono mā ngā pane, nā reira i whakataka puku taua kōwhiringa, ā, ka taunoa ngā tono ki tētahi putanga API arokite nāna te kirimana {translate} i whakakāhore i te tinana ki HTTP 400 (waehere hapa {code}). Ka whakaoti i te whakatika i tīmataria i te 3.0.1.
releases.v301: {label} Ko te tinana tono {translate} ināianei he huānga JSON noa iho o ngā tūemi {textItem}, kaua ko te ahanoa {inputs} kua takaia, e ōrite ana ki te kirimana REST v3.0. Kāore tēnei i whakaora i ngā whakamāoritanga — tirohia te 3.0.2.

items.newInputs: Ngā tāurunga hōu: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, me ngā pona Kaiwhakamāori arā atu anō {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker}, me {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: Kua whakamua hoki te wāhi pūtake ki te Kaiwhakamāori hei {fromLocale} kia kore ai ngā aho poto e kiteanoatia.
items.resilience: {label} ngana anō aunoa ki ngā urupare HTTP rangitahi ({statusCodes}) e whakahonore ana i te pane {retryAfter} o Azure — ka hoki whakamuri ki te whakahoki taupua ātete. Ka taea te whakarite mā te {maxRetries} me te {retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} ngā maimai pēnei i {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} me ngā mea HTML ka takaia ki ngā kaitiaki i mua i te whakamāoritanga, ā, ka whakaorangia ā muri ake, nā reira ka mutu te whakangaro a te Kaiwhakamāori i ngā puriwāhi i18next/Mustache/Handlebars/.NET/printf. Takahuri mā te {protectPlaceholders}; toro atu ki te {customPlaceholderPatterns}. {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} tāurunga {noTranslatePatterns} hōu ka whakataka katoa ngā kī ōrite mai i te tono Kaiwhakamāori (ka pupuri i ngā uara pūtake mō ngā ingoa parani, waehere hapa, aha atu). He whakaōrite i ngā tauira glob ki ngā kī taumata-parser (ara iraira JSON, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI/restext key). {issue}
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.audit: Mā te Arotaupū NPM (0 ngā whakaranautanga).
items.docsSite: Astro + Tailwind v4 docs site with view transitions and Expressive Code.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA paheke. Ka tahuri ngā glyphs moko ki ngā ara kia kore ai e hinga i te taumira tae ki ngā tūnga rōnaki, ka whakamahia e te pātene {backToTop} māngi te {inert} i te wā e huna ana (kaua ko te takahuri {ariaHidden} ka taea te ripa), {formatsAstro} kua kore ngā wāhanga e tūtuki ki ō rātou ID panekōrero i hangaia aunoatia, e toru ngā kāri tauwāhi ināianei e whakaatu ana i ngā huanga {lang} whaimana BCP-47 ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), ka wetewete te tārite {documentation} ngā tapanga rohe i waenga i te paetaha me te hiku,  ā, ko ia ripanga raraunga i runga i ngā kaipuke {inputs}/{configuration} me tētahi tapanga pūpānui mata.
items.inlineCode: {label} te {codeElement} prose docs ināianei e mau ana i te nako tāhuhu mahana/amipere — he rerekē i te papatā nako parani→nako e whakamahia ana mō ngā hononga me ngā panekōrero.
items.automation: Dependabot auto-merge, CodeQL scanning, CI matrix.
